name: Texas Caviar- the Big Texan Steak Ranch
recipeIngredient: 4 1/4 ounces blackeyed peas, cooked and drained
1/2 cup green chiles, diced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Refrigerate the mixture overnight.
3. Serve on lettuce leaves and with tortilla chips as a salad or appetizer.
